name: @cortexkit/pi-anthropic-auth
description_en: Pi package for CortexKit Anthropic OAuth support. It overrides Pi's built-in `anthropic` provider with a CortexKit provider extension backed by the shared `@cortexkit/anthropic-auth-core` package.
description_zh: CortexKit Anthropic OAuth支持的Pi包。它用由共享@cortexkit/anthropic-auth-core包支持的CortexKit提供程序扩展覆盖Pi内置的`anthropic`提供程序。
